description: Page Two THE AUGUSTA COURIER He who spares no class of men is angry at no person but the vices of all 1300 Southern Finance Building Augusta Georgia 30902 SecondClass Postage Paid at Augusta Georgia SUBSCRIPTION RATE Published Weekly by The Courier Publishing Company Year 400 THE CIVIL RIGHT THEY ALL DUCK The Courier Pittsburgh Pennsylvania August 17 1963 A Negro Newspaper The one civil right which is basic and may determine the future course of American civilization is the right to marry the person of ones choice regardless of race color or national origin but everybody ducks discussing or advocating it When uremic and indomitable White House correspondent Miss Mae Craig white recently asked President Kennedy whether he intended to promote legislation abrogating such state laws he was almost tongue tied and never did answer her question The states barring marriage between whites Orientals and Negroes are Georgia Maryland Mississippi Virginia Idaho Missouri Montana Nebraska Nevada Oregon South Dakota and Wyoming The states specifically barring marriage between whites and Negroes are Alabama Arkansas Colorado Delaware Florida Indiana Kentucky Louisiana North Carolina North Dakota Oklahoma South Carolina Ten nessee Texas and West Virginia As long as antiintermarriage laws remain on
